title: Guard the hydration boundary
description: Server-rendered markup must match the first client render, so non-deterministic or browser-only output must wait.
body: Use when output depends on the current time, random values, or browser state and the route is server-rendered. Do not render values during SSR that the client will compute differently on hydration. Actions: render a stable placeholder on the server and fill browser-derived values in onMount, or use the browser guard from $app/environment to branch; keep the initial client render identical to the server HTML. Validation signals include no hydration-mismatch warning in the console and identical server and first-client markup. Risk boundary: a mismatch silently discards server markup and re-renders, hurting performance and sometimes flashing wrong content.
